label: Fair Value Gap
description:
Price-action strategy on 3-candle imbalance zones ('fair value gaps'); price is hypothesized to return and fill the gap. Research reached a first backtest but never entered the v2 pipeline - no basket validation, no significance gates, no fee-modeled implementation.
First-pass single-instrument backtest (2016-2026, 667 trades, net of modeled fees): Sharpe ~0.34, CAGR ~1.6%, max drawdown ~-11.5% - a thin edge, consistent with the 'never validated' status.
reference: Discretionary ICT-style 'fair value gap' concept; no academic source
